profile.name: Venkat Srinivasa Raghavan
profile.title: Software Developer | Data Scientist | ML Engineer

about.intro: Hello! I’m Venkat Srinivasa Raghavan, a dedicated software developer and data enthusiast currently pursuing my Master of Science in Data Science at Northeastern University, Boston.
sections: My professional journey began after earning my Bachelor's in Engineering from R V College of Engineering in Bengaluru, India. I honed my skills at Airbus, contributing to scalable systems for aircraft hardware analytics and automating flight testing processes.

At Northeastern, I am deeply engaged in research and competitive programming, contributing as a Teaching Assistant and excelling in real-world projects like CodeQuest, CodeSage, and a real-time multiplayer chess game.
My career aspirations are rooted in leveraging data-driven insights and scalable software solutions to solve complex problems, making a meaningful impact in the tech world.

projects.name: CodeSage
projects.description: A smart code review system powered by AI, helping developers write better code.

projects.name: CodeQuest
projects.description: An interactive platform for practicing competitive programming.

projects.name: Chess Game
projects.description: A feature-rich chess platform with analytics and AI-powered opponents.
